results.releaseNotes:
We're frequently updating Fubo to give you the best experience. Turn on auto updates to ensure you always have the latest version. This update includes:
[+] Live Scores with Spoiler Prevention toggles in the Settings page
results.description:
Watch NFL, MLB, NBA, NHL, NASCAR, NCAA college football, NCAA college basketball, WNBA, MLS soccer, F1 racing, FIFA World Cup qualifiers, UEFA Champions League, English Premier League, LaLiga, Bundesliga and more, all live. Plus, stream acclaimed TV series, live news and award-winning movies. Enjoy unlimited Cloud DVR and dedicated sports navigation to watch what you want, when you want.

350+ LIVE TV CHANNELS
Fubo has over 350 TV channels and is the only way to get every Nielsen-rated sports channel without cable. Fubo features ABC, CBS, NBC, FOX, ESPN, CBS Sports Network, FS1, USA Network, NFL Network, NFL RedZone from NFL Network, NBA TV, MLB Network, MLB Network Strike Zone, NHL Network, beIN SPORTS, Telemundo, Golf Channel, SEC Network, ACC Network, Big Ten Network, Olympic Channel, Willow TV, Tennis Channel, regional sports networks for most local markets and beyond.

COLLEGE FOOTBALL’S POWER FOUR & MORE
See the biggest games & the best teams from all around the country. Enjoy comprehensive coverage of the ACC, Big Ten, Big 12 and SEC conferences on live channels like ESPN, ABC, CBS, FOX, NBC, Big Ten Network, FS1, SEC Network, ACC Network, FS2, CBS Sports Network, ESPN 2, CW Network and more.

THE MOST LOCAL SPORTS FOR THE LOWEST PRICE
With FanDuel Sports Networks, NBC Sports Regional Networks, YES Network, MSG Network, NESN, MASN, Marquee Sports Network, Chicago Sports Network, Root Sports, Altitude Sports, Space City Home Network and other regional sports networks available in select local markets, Fubo offers access to most live games and dedicated local coverage of NBA, NHL and MLB teams all season long. Subject to local availability and national blackout restrictions.

EXTENSIVE LIVE SPORTS COVERAGE & MAJOR EVENTS
NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, NCAA, PGA golf, WNBA, NASCAR, F1...you name it, we got it. That’s over 50,000 live pro and college events — regional to international, including NFL games, MLB games, NBA Finals, NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs, FIFA World Cup, U.S. Open, Triple Crown, Olympics, tennis grand slams, ICC Cricket World Cup and more. Stream it all live.

LIVE SOCCER GAMES FROM AROUND THE WORLD
Watch live soccer from top leagues, international club competitions and competitions between national soccer teams during the FIFA World Cup qualifiers, UEFA Champions League, Europa League, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, Liga MX, MLS and more. See Manchester City, Liverpool and other clubs in Premier League matches on NBCUniversal channels. Catch El Clásico between Real Madrid and Barcelona and other matches from LaLiga on ESPN Deportes.

TV SHOWS & MOVIES, LIVE & ON DEMAND
Fubo has over 10,000 hours of on-demand TV shows and movies. So you can catch up on acclaimed series and popular movies on ABC, CBS, FOX, NBC, Comedy Central, Ion Television, Hallmark Channel, TV Land, MTV, Disney Channel, Nickelodeon, Bravo, USA Network, Paramount + with SHOWTIME, FX, Paramount Network, Telemundo and more.

NEVER MISS ANOTHER PLAY
Unlimited Cloud DVR space is included with every account. Record anything, start watching on one device and finish on any other. Forgot to set the record options? No problem. You can replay nearly any game, show or movie that aired in the last 3 days with 72-hour Lookback.

WATCHING LIVE STREAMS
Like YouTube TV, ESPN +, Sling TV, Peacock, Paramount + & other live sports streaming services as well as mostly entertainment streaming services like Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max, Pluto TV & Amazon Prime Video, a high-speed connection, whether through a mobile data plan or internet provider like Comcast Xfinity or Spectrum, is required to live stream from a phone, tablet or connected device like Roku.

Terms of Service: https://www.fubo.tv/documents/terms-of-service
Privacy policy: https://www.fubo.tv/documents/privacy-policy
This app features Nielsen’s proprietary measurement software which will allow you to contribute to market research like Nielsen’s TV Ratings. Please see nielsen.com/digitalprivacy for more information.
